generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The recent attacks in European cities prove we need stronger domestic security powers. While some worry about civil liberties, we've built safeguards into these measures. The alternative is playing catch-up after more tragedies. #NationalSecurityFirst
